'''shavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wrily|wrily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wrily|wrily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shavate|shavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shavatesher|shavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavatesherĂ«m|shavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shavatero|shavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavateshĂ«|shavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavateshĂ«m|shavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishavatero|gokishavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavateshĂ«|gokishavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavateshĂ«m|gokishavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshavankerom|goshavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavankeshĂ«|goshavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavankeshĂ«m|goshavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshavankeya|goshavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shavaterom|shavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavatemu|shavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shavateya|shavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishavaterom|gokishavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavatemu|gokishavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishavateya|gokishavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shavavate|shavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shavavatesher|shavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavatesherĂ«m|shavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shavavatero|shavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavavateshĂ«|shavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavateshĂ«m|shavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishavavatero|gokishavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavavateshĂ«|gokishavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavateshĂ«m|gokishavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshavavankerom|goshavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavavankeshĂ«|goshavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavankeshĂ«m|goshavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshavavankeya|goshavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shavavaterom|shavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavatemu|shavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shavavateya|shavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishavavaterom|gokishavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavatemu|gokishavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishavavateya|gokishavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠte|shĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠtesher|shĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠtero|shĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠvĂŠtero|gokishĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠvĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠvĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠterom|shĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠtemu|shĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠvĂŠteya|shĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠvĂŠterom|gokishĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠvĂŠteya|gokishĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafvafte|shafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafvaftesher|shafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafvaftesherĂ«m|shafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafvaftero|shafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafvafteshĂ«|shafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafvafteshĂ«m|shafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafvaftero|gokishafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafvafteshĂ«|gokishafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafvafteshĂ«m|gokishafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafvafnkerom|goshafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafvafnkeshĂ«|goshafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafvafnkeshĂ«m|goshafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafvafnkeya|goshafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafvafterom|shafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafvaftemu|shafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafvafteya|shafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafvafterom|gokishafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafvaftemu|gokishafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafvafteya|gokishafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
